title: calamus parutan
intro: Calamus parutan is a type of plant, also known as Kaempferia parviflora, belonging to the family Zingiberaceae, commonly found in Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of calamus parutan include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestive health, and alleviate symptoms of menstrual cramps and menopausal hot flashes. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizome is often used to make tea, tinctures, or capsules, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
